companies.name: Skild AI
companies.why: Largest direct foundation-model competitor; omni-bodied platform validates the robot brain race.

companies.name: Figure AI
companies.why: Capital and valuation set the commercialization benchmark for humanoid Physical AI.

companies.name: Physical Intelligence (Pi)
companies.focus: Robot foundation models / universal robot brain
companies.why: Highest-priority watch target for general-purpose robot intelligence software.

companies.name: General Intuition
companies.why: New spatial intelligence lab; directly relevant to simulation-to-world agents.

companies.name: Memories.ai
companies.investors: Susa Ventures-led reported; Qualcomm/Samsung named on site
companies.focus: Large Visual Memory Model, video search, on-device visual memory
companies.why: Competitor for visual memory layer; strong fit for wearables/robotics but funding needs secondary-source verification.

companies.name: TwelveLabs
companies.investors: Databricks, Snowflake, SK Telecom, HubSpot Ventures reported
companies.focus: Marengo/Pegasus video foundation models and video-to-text APIs
companies.why: Mature video understanding platform; strongest benchmark for Oyster's visual memory/search stack.

companies.name: Rerun
companies.focus: Data layer for multimodal Physical AI telemetry
companies.why: Infrastructure competitor/partner for robot, drone, and car data logging.

breakthroughs.title: AMI Labs / Yann LeCun World Models
breakthroughs.summary: $1.03B seed round signals a market shift from pure LLMs to JEPA-style world models.

breakthroughs.title: NVIDIA Cosmos 3
breakthroughs.summary: Omnimodal world models for Physical AI combine language, image, video, and audio understanding.

breakthroughs.title: Google DeepMind Genie 3
breakthroughs.summary: General-purpose world model that generates interactive environments from simple text descriptions.

breakthroughs.title: World Labs Marble + World API
breakthroughs.summary: Marble enables spatially cohesive, persistent 3D world generation from images, video, or text.

breakthroughs.title: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Thor
breakthroughs.summary: Blackwell-powered edge compute for humanoid robots; 2070 FP4 TFLOPS in a power-configurable module.

breakthroughs.title: Memories.ai Project LUCI
breakthroughs.summary: On-device visual memory demo with Windows ML and Qualcomm X2 Elite, targeting zero-cloud-latency indexing.

discarded.reason: No primary source or mechanical verification; duplicate of stronger sources
No verifiable primary source, no dated funding/product evidence
Aggregated claims without primary URL verification

discarded.finding: Unverified Memories.ai $16M claim as sole evidence
discarded.reason: Kept product only; funding retained as reported but not treated as primary-verified
